flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of South Carolina-Upstate fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5k → 4.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of South Carolina-Upstate fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of South Carolina-Upstate rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (61.0% → 69.8%).
